label: Bed Glow Relief Reaction
best_use: Late-night exam panic or secret relief format where the phone screen glow drives the mood.
ugc_principle: Low-light intimacy makes the reaction feel private, confessional, and highly native to short-form feeds.

camera_logic.camera_role: front-facing phone camera held above or in front of the face while lying in bed
camera_logic.start_state: subject is already holding the phone in low light
camera_logic.pickup_behavior: not about pickup; about subtle repositioning in hand
camera_logic.framing: tight face framing with strong phone glow
camera_logic.face_position: center or slightly low-center works here
camera_logic.movement_style: slow drift, tired hand sway, small tilt when sitting up or lying back down
camera_logic.reframe_rule: movement should feel sleepy and intimate, never polished

swap_variables: sits up vs lies back down

prompt_skeleton: RAW FRONT-CAM FOOTAGE in a dark room.
The phone screen is the main light source on the face.
The subject is tired and reading in silence or whispering softly.
A visible expression shift happens on the face without overacting.
The phone drifts slightly because the hand is tired.
